entity.summary: Long-running centralized crypto exchange founded in 2011 and currently described by its official site as headquartered in the United Kingdom.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0403 and hei_unadded_0404 as one entity. HEI uses the current operating-headquarters description published on BTCC's official site. This does not erase the brand's historical Chinese roots or imply that all current regional legal providers are UK-incorporated; official materials also identify Poland, Lithuania, and Cayman Islands entities for particular services.

events.title: BTCC recorded as centralized exchange
events.description: BTCC is recorded as a long-running centralized exchange founded in 2011, with CoinPaprika and CoinGecko candidate rows consolidated into one active entity and current UK headquarters supported by official-site material.
events.notes: Upgrade with a precise launch, rebrand, shutdown, licensing, or operating-history event if stronger sources are added.

evidence.title: BTCC official website
evidence.notes: Official domain used to verify BTCC identity.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for BTCC
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0403.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BTCC
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0404.

evidence.title: BTCC official company profile
evidence.notes: BTCC's standardized official-site company profile states that the exchange was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in the UK. HEI uses this only for the current operating-origin field.
